conversations.notes:
📝 Auto + Home Bundle Quote

🕞 Started at 2:05 PM on 05/06/2026 | 27 min

Buying Temperature:

7 / 10

Objections / Blockers:

• Price – Comparing current policies before making decision

• Timing – Policies already paid through October

• Other – Wants written quote details to review carefully before switching

• Other – Concerned about claim reliability and long-term carrier stability

Personal Notes (Reconnect Hooks):

• Previously insured with USAA for 56 years before major premium increase

• Very detail-oriented and prefers everything in writing

• Negative past experiences with claim denials and verbal agreements changing

• Completed mature driver safety course with spouse recently

• Values carrier reliability over simply getting the cheapest rate

Current Carrier / Premium(s):

Home: Current home policy previously increased to over $3,800/year with USAA before switching carriers

Auto: Current carrier unknown after leaving USAA

Quoted Premium(s):

Home (Farmers): $1,646.47

Auto (Farmers): $767 / 6 months

Bundle Total: Approx. $3,180 annually combined
